Create conservative reporting text for a cluster-permutation result

Source: R/cluster-permutation-diagnostics.R
report_gazepoint_cluster_permutation.Rd

Generates cautious manuscript-ready wording for a cluster-permutation result. The wording avoids precise onset or offset claims and frames cluster timing as descriptive.

Usage

report_gazepoint_cluster_permutation(
  result,
  cluster_alpha = 0.05,
  digits = 3L,
  include_assumptions = TRUE
)

Arguments

result

Object returned by run_gazepoint_cluster_permutation().

cluster_alpha

Cluster-level alpha used to classify clusters.

digits

Number of digits used for p-values.

include_assumptions

Should an assumptions note be included?

Value

An object of class gazepoint_cluster_report.
